subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from the precincts of the Prison, and announceth unto thee the favors of thy Lord, before Whose Name the multitudes have bowed down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی یذکرک المظلوم من شطر السجن و یبشرک بعنایه ربک الذی لاسمه خضع الملا
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @consolation and comfort, @justice and wrath of God
